rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quiet Title And Cancel Deeds And Encumbrances To Permit Receivers Sale Per This Courts Prior Orders And To Enforce Settlement Agreement; And To Enjoin Ronald Mazzaferro And Frank Mardeusz From Interfering With The Sale And From Recording Any Document Against The Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER WILLIAM PARISI's Motion To Quiet Title And Cancel Deeds And Encumbrances To Permit Receivers Sale Per This Courts Prior Orders And To Enforce Settlement Agreement; And To Enjoin Ronald Mazzaferro And Frank Mardeusz From Interfering With The Sale And From Recording Any Document Against The Property continued to October 26 2017 to be heard by the Honorable Andrew Y.S. Cheng in department 606 at 9:00 a.m. per the order of the Presiding Judge. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2017 line 2. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF BUILDING INSPECTION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION Sustained without leave to amend. The petition on it's face fails to state any grounds for relief. Petitioner filed a non-opposition. Intervenor's late-filed opposition fails to address the insufficiency of allegations in the petition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2017 line 3. PETITIONER CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION's Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien Continued to October 11, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than October 2, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTREA INVESTMENTS AND TRADING LLC, VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC, FRANK NOLAN and CARLOS CABARCOS' DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for breach of contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTREA INVESTMENTS AND TRADING LLC, VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs VANGUARD PROPERTIES INC, FRANK NOLAN and CARLOS CABARCOS' MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Request for attorney's fees and disgorgement is proper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike Slapp
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 28, 2017 line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT DEBORAH CHATMAN's Special Motion To Strike Slapp DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden and show that any of the causes of action asserted in the complaint arise out of protected activity, i.e. that the "targeted claim" amounts to a cause of action within the meaning of CCP 425.16 "in the sense that it is alleged to justify a remedy." Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal.5th 376, 395. = (501/REQ)
